title: Audit log captures every consequential state change
description:
For each major state-changing action, verify the audit log records
the action with actor, timestamp, target record, and before/after
state. Tampering checks live alongside.

raw.title: Audit log captures every consequential state change
raw.description:
For each major state-changing action, verify the audit log records
the action with actor, timestamp, target record, and before/after
state. Tampering checks live alongside.
completion_criteria: Every consequential state change in the cycle is captured.
The audit log itself cannot be edited or deleted by any non-admin role (verified by AUDIT-IMMUTABLE-001).
